ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Evelyn Wynn for trustee CPT Institute (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Filing First Account and Report.

Ms. Wynn confirmed that the first account and report had been submitted for filing on February 19, 2026. The Court confirmed with the clerk that the petition had been successfully e-filed and set for hearing on April 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The status hearing was taken off calendar.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Off Calendar

Petition To Establish Pooled Special Needs Trust, For Order To Execute Joinder Documents, And For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together:
PES-23-306273, The Estate of Betty Suey Hai Yee; and
PTR-24-307817, In the Matter of the Lotus Yee Special Needs Trust

Appearances:
Hanlen J. Chang for Steven Yee, Petitioner/Administrator.
Jennifer C. Marlowe, Guardian Ad Litem for Lotus Yee, Heir-at-Law.

The court addressed the petition to establish the special needs trust (PTR-24-307817). Ms. Marlow confirmed that the reimbursement of the filing fee should be $435 and not the $450 initially requested. The court inquired if there were any objections; none were raised. The court took the petition to establish special needs trust under submission with intent to grant.

The court then addressed the first and final accounting petition (PES-23-306273). The court inquired if there were any objections; none were raised. The court took the petition under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
